evidence: "Little House on the Prairie grasps the concept of family values better than any other."
"It's a good movie with a good message."
"It's just a really good film that has something powerful to say about having faith."
"It's very heartrending and emotional, but it is absolutely wonderful."
"It's a beautiful, beautiful story with all the morality, love, and sensitivity that you could ask for in a movie."
"The acting was very strong and the story was inspiring."
"The singing was outstanding too--this is a great movie for children as well as adults."
"I have recently become a huge Little House fan, thanks to my mom who got me hooked on the TV series =)"
"If you are an avid 'Anne' fan like me, by all means watch this edition and enjoy seeing your favorite characters for the third time."
"The acting is so strong--in fact, all of the acting in 'Little House on the Prairie' is amazing."
"It is a truly beautiful story that moved me so deeply."

summary: The user has a strong preference for family-oriented dramas with simple narratives and emotional depth. They appreciate high production quality and are particularly moved by stories that convey strong moral messages and family values.
